items.name: blur-reveal
items.title: BlurReveal
items.description: A calm, spring-driven text reveal: blur and opacity fade in together while the text rises by 16px. No overshoot. The reference Onda primitive.

items.name: fade-in
items.title: FadeIn
items.description: A pure opacity fade for text — no movement, no scale, no blur. The simplest possible reveal.

items.name: slide-in
items.title: SlideIn
items.description: A direction-parameterized translate-and-fade entrance — text slides into place from up, down, left, or right on the house spring. No overshoot, calm 16px travel.

items.name: scale-in
items.title: ScaleIn
items.description: A subtle scale-from-slightly-smaller-and-fade entrance. No overshoot, no scale jumps — restrained on purpose.

items.name: rotate-in
items.title: RotateIn
items.description: A calm, spring-driven text rotation: the text settles from a slight starting angle (default -8 degrees) to 0 while fading in. No overshoot. Restraint applies to angle — the safe zone is [-12, +12] degrees.

items.name: mask-reveal
items.title: MaskReveal
items.description: Reveals text from behind a retreating mask. The text is rendered fully from frame 0 — only a clip-path inset shrinks, uncovering the text edge-by-edge with a crisp hard edge. Direction names the side the text comes in from.

items.name: word-stagger
items.title: WordStagger
items.description: Multi-word text where each word fades and rises in sequence — the clearest demonstration of the Onda stagger fingerprint.

items.name: typewriter
items.title: Typewriter
items.description: Character-by-character text reveal with an optional blinking cursor in the Onda accent. Linear pacing by design — the one intentional exception to the house spring rule, because typing has its own constant rhythm.

items.name: count-up
items.title: CountUp
items.description: An animated number that counts from `from` to `to` on SPRING_SMOOTH while fading in. Tabular numerals keep digit widths fixed; locale-grouped (en-US) by default. Prefix and suffix support currency, units, and percentages.

items.name: draw-on
items.title: DrawOn
items.description: An SVG path that strokes itself in — the substrate for logos, icons, and signature flourishes. Powered by @remotion/paths's evolvePath, driven by SPRING_SMOOTH. No overshoot.

items.name: grain-overlay
items.title: GrainOverlay
items.description: A subtle film-grain layer overlaid on the canvas — pure SVG fractal noise, no text, no motion. The first atmospheric Onda primitive: texture only, restrained at ~2-4% opacity per the design tokens. Deterministic and self-contained, no external assets.

items.name: stagger-group
items.title: StaggerGroup
items.description: A composition primitive that reveals a list of items in sequence using the canonical Onda stagger (4 frames between siblings). The foundation pattern for animated lists, bullet build-ons, feature reveals, and any sequenced text reveal. Demonstrates the signature stagger fingerprint in its purest form.

items.name: marquee
items.title: Marquee
items.description: A seamless looping horizontal scroll — logo strips, ticker tape, 'as featured in' rows. Slow and restrained by design; atmospheric context, not a frantic ticker.

items.name: ken-burns
items.title: KenBurns
items.description: Slow zoom-and-pan over a photo — the iconic documentary motion (named after Ken Burns, the filmmaker). Restrained 1.0 → 1.1 scale over 5 seconds by default; intentionally linear for a constant cinematic drift. The first Onda cinematic primitive.

items.name: callout
items.title: Callout
items.description: A label-and-arrow annotation pointing at a specific spot on the canvas. The bubble appears first with a calm scale-and-fade; after a small beat the arrow draws on from the bubble to the anchor. For highlighting UI in tutorials, naming parts in explainers, or drawing attention without obscuring content.

items.name: underline
items.title: Underline
items.description: Text fades in, then an accent-rose underline draws beneath it after a small beat. A two-phase reveal for emphasis — one of the catalog's rare earned-color moments.

items.name: captions
items.title: Captions
items.description: Sequential word-by-word captions driven by a timed array. The active word lifts in --onda-text with a subtle SPRING_SMOOTH scale pulse; surrounding words sit dim in --onda-dim. The data primitive for kinetic transcripts and AI-generated voiceover.

items.name: bar-chart
items.title: BarChart
items.description: Horizontal bars that grow from 0 to their value on SPRING_SMOOTH, staggered. Single-accent palette: the largest bar earns the dusty-rose accent, every other bar sits in --onda-dim. Calm, no overshoot, one focal moment.

items.name: lower-third
items.title: LowerThird
items.description: Broadcast-style name + role bar that slides in from the corner with a single accent underline. A restrained scene block composed from SlideIn, FadeIn, and Underline — no chrome, no glow, one earned accent.

items.name: title-card
items.title: TitleCard
items.description: Hero title-card scene block: a large headline reveals with a calm blur-and-rise, a subtitle cascades word-by-word beneath it, and an optional accent underline arrives last as quiet punctuation. Composes BlurReveal / Underline and WordStagger — no new motion of its own.

items.name: stat-card
items.title: StatCard
items.description: Flagship Onda data scene — a big counted-up number above a word-staggered label above an accent rule. Composes CountUp, WordStagger, and Underline so the cascade (number → label → rule) reads as one calm motion. The signature 'Onda data look' for hero stats, KPIs, milestones, and announcement frames.

items.name: quote-card
items.title: QuoteCard
items.description: A centered pull-quote scene block with attribution. The quote reveals word-by-word with a slower-than-canonical stagger so the line reads rather than cascades; after a settled beat a small accent-rose rule draws in beneath it, then the author and role fade in together. Built for testimonials, documentary citations, and editorial-feeling section breaks.

items.name: end-card
items.title: EndCard
items.description: Closing scene block: a hero CTA reveals with an optional accent underline, then a faint, staggered row of social handles or URLs fades in beneath it. Composes BlurReveal, Underline, and StaggerGroup so the motion fingerprint stays consistent with the rest of the catalog.

items.name: logo-sting
items.title: LogoSting
items.description: Silent, restrained branded reveal: an SVG logo stroke draws in, a title settles beneath it, and a single accent underline lands last. A scene block composed strictly from DrawOn, ScaleIn, and Underline — no particles, no streaks, no flourish.

items.name: camera-shake
items.title: CameraShake
items.description: Wraps children with a subtle, deterministic camera shake that decays to rest. Driven by Remotion's seeded random() so the same seed always produces the same shake — no Math.random in the render path.

items.name: gradient-shift
items.title: GradientShift
items.description: A quiet, drifting two-color linear gradient background. The angle rotates at a constant degrees-per-frame — linear-by-design, no spring. Low-saturation defaults (--onda-surface to --onda-border) keep it atmospheric, never focal.

items.name: word-rotate
items.title: WordRotate
items.description: Cycles through a list of phrases in place. Each phrase fades and lifts in via SPRING_SMOOTH, holds, then fades out as the next arrives — overlapping envelopes for a continuous swap.

items.name: spotlight
items.title: Spotlight
items.description: Apple-stage radial light reveal — a soft circle of light grows from 0 to its target radius, centered at (x, y). Alpha-aware so it reveals content beneath.

items.name: highlight
items.title: Highlight
items.description: Marker-style background reveal that slides in behind text. Like Underline but full text-height — accent rose by default, one of the catalog's earned-color moments.

items.name: pie-reveal
items.title: PieReveal
items.description: An SVG arc that fills from 0 to its value percent on SPRING_SMOOTH. Track + accent stroke, optional centered value label. Single-arc by design — no multi-segment pies.

items.name: progress-bar
items.title: ProgressBar
items.description: A track-and-fill progress bar that fills from 0 to its value percent on SPRING_SMOOTH. Tabular-num label keeps the right edge of the bar stable as it grows.

items.name: timeline
items.title: Timeline
items.description: A drawn horizontal line with staggered dots and labels — the journey ends at the dusty-rose accent moment (the final dot). Composes evolvePath + entryScale + entryFade.

items.name: icon-pop
items.title: IconPop
items.description: A small state icon — check, cross, dot, or star — that pops into place with SPRING_SMOOTH. The icon itself is the earned dusty-rose accent. Just scale + opacity, no extra flourish.

items.name: fade-out
items.title: FadeOut
items.description: Pure opacity exit — text fades from 1 to 0 starting at delay. Faster than entrances by design (DURATION.fast). No transform, no blur, no scale.

items.name: slide-out
items.title: SlideOut
items.description: Direction-parameterized translate + fade exit. Mirrors SlideIn — text leaves in the chosen direction with calm 16px travel and opacity fade.

items.name: parallax
items.title: Parallax
items.description: Slow horizontal or vertical drift over an image — the lighter, no-zoom complement to KenBurns. Linear-by-design (joins Marquee/Typewriter/KenBurns).

items.name: vignette
items.title: Vignette
items.description: Static radial darkening at canvas edges — cinematic frame. Atmospheric overlay only; no motion, like GrainOverlay. pointer-events: none so it never intercepts input.

items.name: chapter-card
items.title: ChapterCard
items.description: A chapter title scene block — large numbered index ("01") fades in, the chapter title blurs into place, and an optional accent rule lands last. Composes FadeIn + BlurReveal + Underline.
